title: MENTAL HEALTH COUNSELING - 211info
text: LIFESTANCE HEALTH EUGENE 44 CLUB ROAD MENTAL HEALTH COUNSELING Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides mental health evaluations; individual, couples, and faith-based counseling; and psychiatric medication evaluation and management services. 44 Club Road Suite 200 Eugene, OR 97401 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Friday 8:30am-5pm (541) 972-6302 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 972-6302 INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call or visit website for more information FEES: Varies by service. Accepts Medicaid, Medicare, and most private insurances. DOCUMENTS: Insurance information, if applicable LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: Lane County Services: Conjoint Counseling Group Counseling Individual Counseling Mental Health Evaluation Psychiatric Medication Services If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
